fields.acceptance_criteria: Two-tab interface (description.md + ticket.toml); Markdown rendering with syntax-highlighted code blocks in WASM (pulldown-cmark + syntect); TOML generation from fields; loading/error/empty states; active tab persistence
fields.title: Port: TicketContent viewer — Markdown + TOML tabs

fields.acceptance_criteria: Two-tab interface: description.md rendered as Markdown + TOML tab showing ticket fields as dynamically generated TOML (generated from in-memory ticket struct, not raw file); Markdown rendering via pulldown-cmark+syntect; TOML tab content mirrors the current live field state (useful for copy-paste or debugging); loading/error states for both tabs; code syntax highlighting in Markdown code blocks
fields.title: Port: TicketContent viewer — Markdown + TOML tabs
